name: Citicoline / CDP-choline
summary: Citicoline / CDP-choline is best framed for attention support, cognitive recovery context, memory support, and cholinergic signaling, with safety screening for cholinergic sensitivity, stimulant stacking, and anticholinergic medication conflicts.
description: Citicoline / CDP-choline is best framed for attention support, cognitive recovery context, memory support, and cholinergic signaling, with safety screening for cholinergic sensitivity, stimulant stacking, and anticholinergic medication conflicts.
safetyNotes: Use caution with cholinergic sensitivity or medication plans affecting acetylcholine signaling.
